description: The Bandidos Motorcycle Club is an international outlaw motorcycle gang founded in 1966 in Texas, United States by Donald Chambers. Designated as a criminal organization by law enforcement in multiple countries, its members have been convicted of racketeering, drug trafficking, murder, and other crimes. The club operates over 300 chapters in 22 countries with an estimated 3,000-3,500 members.

country_links.evidence_quote: Australia's first Bandidos chapter was formed in Sydney in August 1983. The club has around 400 members and 45 chapters in the country...
country_links.context: The Bandidos have chapters and members in Australia, with the first chapter formed in Sydney in 1983.

country_links.evidence_quote: Bandidos members were among a number of people arrested in Limburg on 28 September 2020 as part of an investigation into a large-scale drug trafficking ring...
country_links.context: Bandidos members were arrested in Belgium as part of a drug trafficking investigation involving cocaine shipments through Antwerp.

country_links.evidence_quote: The club operated in Canada between 2000 and November 2007, with chapters in Ontario, Alberta, Manitoba and Quebec.
country_links.context: The Bandidos operated chapters in Canada from 2000 to 2007, with presence in Ontario, Alberta, Manitoba, and Quebec.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 13 February 1994, fifteen Danish Bandidos members were ambushed by Hells Angels associates at a club in Helsingborg...
country_links.context: Danish Bandidos members were ambushed in Sweden, and the club has a chapter in Denmark that supplied weapons and members for the Nordic Biker War.

country_links.evidence_quote: Bandidos Helsinki chapter president Pentti Tapio Haapanen and vice-president Harri Tapio Reinikainen were convicted of shooting and wounding a Rogues Gallery member and a member of the Lepakko Gang in Sörnäinen , Helsinki in July 2005.
country_links.context: The Bandidos have members and chapters in Finland, and members have been convicted of shootings, drug trafficking, and other crimes there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Bandidos' first chapter in Europe was founded in Marseille on 20 September 1989 when the club patched over the Club de Clichy.
country_links.context: The Bandidos' first European chapter was founded in Marseille, and members have been involved in shootings, drug trafficking, and other crimes in France.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Bandidos expanded into Germany in June 2000 when the club "patched over" seventeen chapters of the Ghostrider's, Road Eagles and Destroyers...
country_links.context: The Bandidos expanded into Germany in 2000, have 74 chapters and 1,200 members there, and have been involved in conflicts with the Hells Angels and other gangs.

country_links.evidence_quote: The first Bandidos chapter in Ireland was formed in Limerick in October 2016.
country_links.context: The Bandidos formed their first chapter in Ireland in Limerick in October 2016, and a prospect club member killed a rival biker.

country_links.evidence_quote: Andreas Olsson... was arrested in October 2006 after 3.6 kilograms of amphetamine were found in his backpack as he returned from Amsterdam, Netherlands.
country_links.context: A Bandidos member was arrested in Amsterdam with amphetamine, indicating the club's drug trafficking route through the Netherlands.

country_links.evidence_quote: New Zealand's first Bandidos chapter was founded in South Auckland in 2012 by club members deported from Australia.
country_links.context: The Bandidos founded chapters in New Zealand and members were convicted for drug importation and assault.

country_links.evidence_quote: This signaled the beginning of the Nordic Biker War... which escalated into Finland, Norway then Denmark and lasted for over three years.
country_links.context: The Nordic Biker War escalated into Norway, where the Bandidos were involved in the conflict.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 24 March 2018, a group of Bandidos members meeting at a restaurant in Prior Velho were attacked by approximately twenty members of the Hells Angels...
country_links.context: Bandidos members were attacked by Hells Angels in Portugal, indicating their presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The president of the Bandidos in Spain – a Belgian national – was arrested in Málaga on 20 October 2021 on charges of drug trafficking...
country_links.context: The president of the Bandidos in Spain was arrested for organizing a cocaine shipment, and a Bandidos member was arrested for hashish trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: Police in Sweden believe that the Bandidos Motorcycle Club makes money primarily through illegal activities... The club has eight chapters in Sweden...
country_links.context: The Bandidos have multiple chapters in Sweden, are involved in drug offenses, violent crimes, extortion, and have been engaged in the Nordic Biker War on Swedish soil.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 11 May 2019, Bandidos members clashed with members of the Zürich Hells Angels chapter and the Broncos... in Belp.
country_links.context: Bandidos members clashed with Hells Angels and Broncos in Belp, Switzerland, resulting in injuries and arrests.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Bandidos operate seven chapters in Thailand. While membership is predominantly Thai, Australian, Danish and Swedish club members are also active in the country.
country_links.context: The Bandidos operate seven chapters in Thailand, with members involved in money laundering, bribery, and illegal land development.

country_links.evidence_quote: Benjamin Parry, an 'active member' of the Bandidos Motorcycle Club... was driving a Ford Transit van... Crawford... was dragged underneath the van...
country_links.context: Bandidos members were involved in a fatal collision and subsequent manslaughter conviction in Plymouth, England.
